title: Silky Grassy Indian Perilla Leaf Biryani
description: A midnight-craving, low-glycemic-friendly Indian dish featuring perilla-leaf-kkaennip, knead, and silky grassy flavors, inspired by Tamil cuisine.

ingredients.name: Perilla leaves (Kkaennip)
ingredients.notes: Fresh, stems removed and discarded, leaves chopped into small pieces

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add 1 small onion, finely chopped, and sauté until translucent.
Add 2 cloves of garlic, minced, and sauté for another minute.
Add the chopped perilla leaves, salt, and 1 teaspoon of garam masala. Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until the leaves are wilted.
